name: browser-vision
purpose: Navigate to a URL, screenshot the page, extract DOM text, answer a query using local LLM — Gawd can see what it shows the Prophit
browser_lifecycle_note: Browser process is started by the daemon at boot via a browser-manager systemd user unit; each Browser-Vision spawn opens a new tab/context against the existing browser process. The browser is recycled when RSS exceeds GAWD_BV_MEMORY_THRESHOLD_MB (default: 512MB). Per-spawn: new context (isolated cookies/storage), new tab, closed after extraction. See docs/architecture/browser-vision-design.md §4 for rationale.

dependencies.playwright: pip install playwright && playwright install chromium

GAWD_BV_QUERY.description: Query to answer about the page (overrides task_description.query)

oneOf.description: JSON input with url and query
Plain string query with URL in injected context or env var

task_description.description: Plain query string; URL must be set via GAWD_BV_URL env var or injected_context

injected_context.description: HTML or pre-extracted text to query against (no browser launch needed)

screenshot_path.description: Absolute path to PNG screenshot, or null if browser launch failed before screenshot

dom_summary.description: Readability-extracted text (first 2000 chars in result; full text used for query-answering), or null

query_answer.description: Answer to the query from the local LLM, or null if query-answering failed

success.description: true if the primary task succeeded; false with error populated on any terminal failure

error.description: Failure reason if success=false; null on success

page_never_loaded.description: Playwright failed before page load; no data

screenshot_ok_dom_failed.description: Page loaded and screenshotted; DOM extraction failed

dom_ok_query_failed.description: Screenshot and DOM succeeded; local LLM query-answering failed

injected_context_no_browser.description: No URL; used injected context for DOM; no browser launched
